title: Flights delayed due to thick mist
description: GARDEN ROUTE AND KAROO NEWS - George Airport...
bodyText:
Breaking News

GARDEN ROUTE AND KAROO NEWS - George Airport is currently experiencing flight delays (arriving and departing) due to the thick mist in the area.

Passengers are asked to be patient or contact the relevant airlines for alternative arrangements.

Passengers inside George Airport waiting for their flights to depart.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
